title: Design Developments Sydney Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: The NSW Building Commission issued a building work rectification order against Design Developments Sydney Pty Ltd requiring remediation of serious defects at 38 Hope Street, Penrith. Non-compliance with the order is a criminal offence under NSW building legislation.
scope: Subject of a NSW Building Commission rectification order requiring remediation of serious building defects; Non-compliance with the order carries criminal liability under NSW building legislation
